hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: All four signals are flat with negative composite scores and modest conviction (~0.35). Altcoins exhibit elevated volatility (0.5‑0.55) and betas above 1, with negative alphas, indicating fragile downside risk in a BTC‑driven selloff. BTC is the least fragile but still lacks positive alpha. To preserve capital we adopt a defensive posture, trim exposure modestly across the board, with larger cuts on the more fragile altcoins (ETH, SOL, LTC).
